---
title: CurveCache
description: Curve geometry cache for span wire tessellation
---

## Overview

The `CurveCache` stores tessellated curve points for each span, enabling efficient rendering and spatial queries without recomputing geometry. Entries are version-tracked and invalidated when source data changes.

## CurveCacheEntry

Represents cached curve geometry for a single span.

### Fields

<ResponseField name="points" type="std::vector<Vec3d>" required>
  Tessellated 3D points along the span curve. Generated by sampling the catenary or line segment based on `GeometrySettings::curve_samples`.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="source_version" type="std::uint64_t" default="0">
  Version number from `SpanRuntimeState::geometry_version` when this entry was last rebuilt. Used to detect stale cache entries.
</ResponseField>

## CurveCache

Container mapping span IDs to their curve cache entries.

### Fields

<ResponseField name="by_span" type="std::unordered_map<ObjectId, CurveCacheEntry>" required>
  Map from span `ObjectId` to its cached curve data. Only contains entries for spans that have been processed by the geometry recalc pipeline.
</ResponseField>

## Version-Based Invalidation

Cache entries are automatically invalidated when:
- Span endpoints (ports/anchors) move
- `GeometrySettings` change (e.g., `curve_samples`, `sag_enabled`)
- Bundle visual settings change (e.g., `sag_ratio`, `wire_radius_m`)

The system compares `CurveCacheEntry::source_version` against `SpanRuntimeState::geometry_version`. When they differ, the cache is stale and triggers a rebuild.

## Querying the Cache

Use `CoreState::find_curve_cache()` to safely query entries:

```cpp
const CurveCacheEntry* entry = core_state.find_curve_cache(span_id);
if (entry && !entry->points.empty()) {
  // Use entry->points for rendering or collision detection
  for (const Vec3d& point : entry->points) {
    // Process point...
  }
}
```

Returns `nullptr` if:
- Span doesn't exist
- Geometry hasn't been computed yet
- Cache was invalidated but not yet rebuilt

## Related Types

- [GeometrySettings](/api/cache/curve-cache#geometry-settings) - Controls curve tessellation quality
- [SpanRuntimeState](/api/cache/runtime-state) - Tracks version numbers for invalidation
- [BoundsCache](/api/cache/bounds-cache) - Derived from curve points
